prompt:
Goal: Create a premium Apple-style smartphone advertising poster for iPhone 17 Pro Max, emphasizing speed, pro camera power, and an orange ultra-premium colorway.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 4:5 aspect ratio, high-resolution commercial product-ad composition. Use a warm orange-to-golden gradient background with subtle texture and dramatic studio lighting.

Layout: A huge dark translucent headline fills the top and middle background in two stacked words: ULTRA POWER. Place a small white Apple logo in the top-left corner and small white text in the top-right reading Tech Vision Recommends. Place a rounded outlined pill label on the left reading the product name. Add small minimal white plus-sign crosshair accents around the poster.

Main subject: A fashionable male model is positioned on the right, cropped from chest upward, wearing a tan puffer vest over a dark rust-red ribbed turtleneck. His face is intentionally covered by a solid medium-brown square censor block. His hand extends toward the camera from the lower-left foreground, holding a glossy orange iPhone-like device very close to the viewer, creating strong perspective and depth. The phone back is visible with a centered Apple logo, metallic orange body, rounded corners, and a raised square camera island with exactly 3 large black camera lenses, 1 small white flash, and 1 small black sensor.

Text content: Add a white feature paragraph on the right side near the model’s torso: “Built for speed.\nPro camera power.\nA19 Pro performance.\nReady for what’s next.” At the bottom, create exactly 4 translucent rounded feature cards with thin white borders and simple white line icons. Card 1: microchip icon, “A19 Pro Chip”, “Faster than ever”. Card 2: camera icon, “48MP Fusion”, “Pro-grade camera”. Card 3: video camera icon, “4K Cinematic”, “Dolby Vision video”. Card 4: battery icon, “All-Day Battery”, “Power that lasts”.

Visual style: Hyper-realistic product photography mixed with clean tech-poster graphic design, bold Apple keynote aesthetic, glossy reflections, warm highlights, shallow depth of field, crisp typography, high contrast, premium advertising finish.

Constraints: Keep the palette dominated by orange, amber, rust, tan, and white. Use exactly 4 bottom feature cards and exactly 5 phone camera-area components as listed. Do not add extra logos, extra cards, watermarks, or unrelated text.
